creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mikhail Teterin from comment #8)
 Hi, Mikhail!

I see ENOSYS only in the vfs_freebsd code, which is, unless you explicitly enabled it, doesn't interfere.

Overall, I never used that FUSE module, so have no idea what happens.

I guess you need to review your smb.conf, striping it down to the basics and run Samba with debug enabled and try to find out what happens when you write to the shares.

Without detailed logs and description of your setup I can't say much, but even then I'm on my own, so it could be helpful to write(with logs and details) to the corresponding Samba users mailing list, seeking for help.
